_meta.description: Catalog of all Claude Code routines targeting FactoryFlowV2 / Prescient Labs. Merged across runs; run history preserved.
_meta.note: Routine enumeration via account/workspace API is not available from this execution context. Entries below are declared from the meta-routine spec and marked unverified until a discovery source confirms them.

routines.name: FactoryFlowV2 — Palantir meta-routine
routines.summary: Orchestrator-of-orchestrators: fuses signals into the ontology and ships one daily digest.

routines.name: Daily Codebase Engineer
routines.summary: Runs small-to-medium code-modifying work; output is code diffs + tests.

routines.name: Three-Hat (Customer / Engineer / Intelligence Analyst)
routines.summary: Customer hat -> leads/customers.json; Engineer hat -> code_health.json; Intel hat -> intel/*.md + draft roadmap.

routines.name: Weekly Deep Clean
routines.summary: Dead-code removal, dependency upgrades, doc-drift fixes, route-pruning proposals.
